Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.neo4j
Provides the API for embedding observations.

    Sets the database name.

    Sets the distance type for index storage and queries.

    Sets the embedding dimension.
    Neo4jVectorStore.Builder

    Sets the property name for storing embeddings.
    Neo4jVectorStore.Builder
    Neo4jVectorStore.Builder.filterExpressionConverter(FilterExpressionConverter filterExpressionConverter)
    Sets the FilterExpressionConverter to use when converting filter expressions to Neo4j Cypher queries.
    Neo4jVectorStore.Builder

    Sets the property name for document IDs.
    Neo4jVectorStore.Builder

    Sets the name of the vector index.
    Neo4jVectorStore.Builder

    Sets whether to initialize the schema.
    Neo4jVectorStore.Builder

    Sets the label for document nodes.
    Neo4jVectorStore.Builder

    Sets the session configuration directly.
    Neo4jVectorStore.Builder

    Sets the property name for text-content.
